summary: The lab will use free/trial sources only through sleeve-specific data contracts. Norgate remains the daily survivor-aware base; SEC EDGAR remains legal filing support; Databento credits require a separate bounded intraday gate; public/free catalyst sources are exploratory-only until PIT completeness is audited; commercial demos require exact field questions.
blocked_actions: Do not claim Portfolio Candidate 002 is fully tested while Catalyst and Dollar-Bar sleeves are disabled.
Do not redistribute disabled sleeve weight into daily sleeves.
Do not use public catalyst calendars for promotion without PIT audit.
Do not spend Databento credits without a bounded pre-run gate.
